top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Match m
JOIN League l ON m.league_id = l.id
JOIN Country c ON m.country_id = c.id
WHERE c.name = 'Germany' 
  AND l.name = '1. Bundesliga'
  AND m.date >= '2008-08-01' 
  AND m.date <= '2008-10-31';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Match m
JOIN League l ON m.league_id = l.id
WHERE l.name = 'Germany 1. Bundesliga' 
  AND m.date BETWEEN '2008-08-01' AND '2008-10-31';

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Match m
JOIN League l ON m.league_id = l.id
JOIN Country c ON m.country_id = c.id
WHERE c.name = 'Germany' 
  AND l.name = '1. Bundesliga'
  AND m.date >= '2008-08-01' 
  AND m.date <= '2008-10-31';
